about.title: about us
about.description: We’re a student-led community dedicated to celebrating and sharing Vietnamese culture through events, food, language, and friendships. Whether you’re Vietnamese or just curious, everyone is welcome to learn, connect, and have fun with us! Stay tuned for our events!

events.title: our events
events.now_signup: SIGN UP FOR OUR TET EVENT NOW!
events.ticker_announcement: 📣 VSA is recruiting new members! Applications are now open! Visit our Events page to apply.
events.ticker_follow: Follow us on Instagram @torontometvsa and TikTok @tmuvsa for the latest updates! 📣 VSA is recruiting new members! Applications are now open—visit our Events page to apply.

archive.title: ARCHIVE
archive.error_head: Heads up: The gallery feed didn’t load.
archive.error_step1: Ensure the Apps Script is deployed as a Web App with access Anyone.
archive.error_step2: Make the Drive folder/images “Anyone with the link: Viewer”.
archive.error_step3: Verify the APPS_SCRIPT_URL and FOLDER_ID constants.
